brand.description: Recording words from the indigenous community

errors.micDeniedOrUnavailable: Microphone access was denied or unavailable: {message}

validation.uploadCsvFirst: Please upload a CSV with words first.
validation.enterWordBeforeEndTime: Please enter the word before marking the end time.

home.headerDescription: Upload a CSV with words to create a collection, then record pronunciations with timestamps for each word.
home.createDialogDescription: Upload a CSV file and name your collection based on the theme.
home.uploadWordListHelperEmpty: Select a CSV word list to upload
home.emptyCollections: No collections yet. Create one by uploading a CSV word list.
home.deleteCollectionDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this collection? This action cannot be undone.

recordingSession.browserNotSupported: This browser does not support audio recording. Try Chrome, Edge, or Safari.

recorder.cardDescription: Start recording, pick a word from the list, then mark the start and end of each pronunciation.
recorder.markDescription: Click 'Mark Start' when the word is spoken, and 'Mark End' when finished.
recorder.selectWordToStart: Select a word to start marking
recorder.recordingEmpty: Recording was empty. Please try again.

wordModal.title: Select a Word
wordModal.description: Choose a word to record. Words with a checkmark have already been marked.

player.empty: No recordings yet. Start recording to create one.
player.deleteRecordingDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this recording? This action cannot be undone.

playback.wordTimestampsDescription: Click a word to jump to that point in the recording.
playback.noWordsMarked: No words were marked in this recording.

csv.needs3ColumnsAudio: CSV file {fileName} must have at least 3 columns for audio collections (id, word, translatedWord).
csv.needs2ColumnsTranscript: CSV file {fileName} must have at least 2 columns for transcript collections (id, word).

offline.title: No Connection Needed
offline.description: Indigisea Recorder is available offline. Return to the home screen to continue recording.
